Class FileSystemPrompts

Namespace
ProjectName.Mcp.FileSystem.Prompts
Assembly
ProjectName.Mcp.Filesystem.dll

I AM the FileSystemPrompts Provider. I give phase agents ready-made mission briefs for exploring and modifying the workspace.

SDK ground truth (ModelContextProtocol C# SDK v1.0.0): Prompt methods return IEnumerable<ChatMessage> (Microsoft.Extensions.AI). The class must NOT be static (see FRAC-PW-PROMPT-001), but methods remain static.

[McpServerPromptType]
public class FileSystemPrompts
Inheritance
object
FileSystemPrompts
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Methods

GetFileModificationBrief(string)

Returns a mission brief instructing the phase agent on how to orchestrate TYPE 1 (Write/Delete) operations.

GetWorkspaceExplorationBrief(string)

Returns a mission brief instructing the phase agent on how to safely explore the workspace using TYPE 2 (Read) operations.
